source_of_truth: feature_list.json is the executable feature tracker. PLAN.md holds Stage deep specs. openspec/changes/<topic>/ holds in-progress and recently-approved spec changes (those with pending implementation). openspec/changes/archive/<topic>/ holds completed/archived spec changes (implementation done, retained for historical reference). See AGENTS.md §8 for relationship.

active_changes.status: done (approved by user, implementation pending stage-12)
active_changes.summary: 应用 Kaku 设计系统 (DESIGN.md) 到 webui。Token 替换 (navy #1b365d / off-white #f5f4ed / Charter serif / pill 999px / 8px card)+ 布局重做 (删 sidebar,改 Card Grid 1-col/2-col density toggle)+ Detail 改 Modal + 3 主题 (Auto/Light/Dark, dark 做 coherent inversion warm near-black + lightened navy)。视觉已通过 webui/dist/design-preview.html v2 验证,用户已批准。6 REQ total (REQ-UI-001 token / 002 app shell / 003 card / 004 theme / 005 modal / 006 boundaries)。零新 IPC / 零新 schema / 零新后端。8 任务 T-UI-001..008,@fixer 按 tasks.md 跑 stage-12。后续 token-usage-history 沿用本设计系统。

archived_changes.archived_reason: Superseded by v0.1-general-credentials on 2026-06-24. Retained for historical reference.
archived_changes.summary: 11 V0.1 spec decisions locked (ProviderKind 3 + Custom / OpenAI quota from openai-balance / DeepSeek quota from cc-switch / Anthropic quota Unsupported / validate_key three-state / Provider duplicates allowed / 3 preset seed + is_preset flag / schema v1 to v2 migration). Stages 1-4 implementation referenced tasks.md.

archived_changes.archived_reason: Implementation complete across stages 1-9; V0.1 released 2026-06-25 (stage-9 sign-off). Spec retained for historical reference.
archived_changes.summary: V0.1 general credentials vault spec: 5 tables (categories / providers / provider_fields / quota_cache / meta), 5 preset seeds (OpenAI / DeepSeek / Anthropic / GitHub / PostgreSQL), 12 IPC commands, 3 themes (Auto / Light / Dark with Radix UI Colors), shadcn/ui + Radix Primitives + Tailwind utility stack, Detail + Tray dual quota display. 20 REQ total (11 ADDED + 5 MODIFIED + 4 REMOVED).

stages.name: Tauri 2 脚手架 + SQLite 数据层 (schema v3)
stages.description: 10 文件:Cargo.toml / tauri.conf.json / build.rs / main.rs / lib.rs / capabilities/default.json / database.rs / store.rs / error.rs / types.rs。SQLite schema v3 — categories + providers + provider_fields + quota_cache + meta(5 张表)。provider_fields.value 全部明文,visibility 二态 visible/masked。V0.1 启动后完全空白,不自动 seed preset provider;用户手动创建所有凭证。

grep value TEXT: PASS (database.rs:37,106)ep preset TEXT: PASS (database.rs:77)
grep category_id INTEGER NOT NULL: PASS (database.rs:79)
grep encryption crates: PASS (empty - no argon2/chacha20/aes-gcm/sodiumoxide/age)
fs::write check: PASS (no fs::write in src-tauri/src/)

stages.notes: Spec 锁于 openspec/changes/v0.1-general-credentials/ (proposal + spec + design + tasks, ~52KB)。**rev 2 修正**:(a) Cargo.toml 已删 aes-gcm/base64/rand (deepwork rev 2 漂移),(b) tauri.conf.json 已设 withGlobalTauri=false, (c) openspec/design.md §6 adapter_for 改 returns Option, (d) 12 IPC 命令计数锁定, (e) openspec/tasks.md T2.6 描述同步。Stage 1 实施文件由 @fixer 按 tasks.md T1.1-T1.9 跑。修 tauri.conf.json 2 处(bundle.icon 占位 + frontendDist ../webui/src → ../webui/dist,label=main 已设)。Cargo.toml 新增 async-trait(无加密 crate,grep 验证)。schema 5 表全建,seed 5 preset。category_id FK + preset TEXT 列 + visibility 二态。无加密代码路径(用户决策 '不加密',V0.2 RFC 评估)。**Phase 1 实施记录(2026-06-24)**: 10 文件 create/modify。cargo check PASS(10 warnings 全 unused code,expected)。6 grep gates 全 PASS。AppState 实际是 Arc<Mutex<Database>>(spec 原 Arc<Database> 因 rusqlite::Connection 非 Sync 改,design.md §5 + tasks.md T1.5 已加 rev 2 注释)。frontendDist 改 ../webui/dist + 创建 webui/dist/index.html 占位(Phase 1.5 重建)。**Phase 1.5 紧接**:webui/{package.json, tsconfig.json, src/types/api.ts} 在 stage-3 文件清单中已包含 types/api.ts,补加 package.json + tsconfig.json。**Session 9 修正**:启动后完全空白,不自动 seed preset provider。

stages.name: Provider 模型 + 5 adapter + CRUD
stages.description: provider/{mod,adapter,openai,deepseek,anthropic,github,postgres}.rs + services/{provider,category}.rs + commands/provider.rs。5 个 preset adapter(每 preset 30-50 行): OpenAI (test: GET /v1/models, quota: subscription+usage 3-month), DeepSeek (test + quota: GET /user/balance), Anthropic (test: POST /v1/messages max_tokens=1, quota: Unsupported), GitHub (no test, quota: GET /rate_limit), PostgreSQL (no test, quota: pg_database_size,需 tokio-postgres)。test_connection 仅 3 LLM 启用,GitHub/Postgres can_test=false。validate_key 错误三态(InvalidKey/Ambiguous/Network)。ProviderField CRUD 含 visibility 切换。Category CRUD 含 default 不可删 + 删除时强制迁移 provider。**12 IPC 命令**(rev 2 修正:list_providers/get/add/update/delete + list_categories/add/delete + test_connection + fetch_quota + get/set_theme)。**adapter_for returns Option**(rev 2 修正:不再 panic,unknown/Custom 返回 None 触发 ProviderCannotTest/ProviderQuotaUnsupported)。Async runtime: HTTP 走 tauri::async_runtime::spawn,SQLite 走 spawn_blocking。

stages.name: UI 主窗口 — shadcn/ui + Radix Colors + Radix Primitives + Detail/Tray quota
stages.description: webui/src/{App.tsx, components/*, hooks/*, lib/*, types/*, styles/*}。栈:React 18 + TypeScript + Vite 5 + TanStack Query v5 + shadcn/ui CLI(Radix Primitives + Tailwind utility,pinned npx shadcn@2.1.0 + pre-validate 1 component)+ @radix-ui/colors 色阶。**Radix Colors 全表**:chrome=gray+iris / status=grass+amber+red+ruby / preset badge A=teal+indigo+orange+gray+cyan。三主题(Dark/Light/Auto via meta.theme + matchMedia),shadcn token override 接 Radix 变量。Detail + Tray 双视图 quota 显示(单一 quota_cache 数据源)。ProviderList sidebar 可折叠分组(Category)。Detail KV 列表 visibility 二态切换 + CopyButton(visible 直复/masked 点 ◉ 切明文)。Category CRUD UI + 删除时迁移 modal。**12 IPC 函数 + 错误统一 toast**(rev 2 修正)。**Phase 1.5 子步** (rev 2): package.json + tsconfig.json + types/api.ts 先于 Phase 2A/2B 落,`pnpm tsc --noEmit` 验证。Phase 2B1 走 shadcn pre-validate (1 个 Button 先),fall back Radix+手写 Tailwind。withGlobalTauri: false + ESM imports。TEMPLATES const = ['blank', 'llm', 'database'] only(REQ-OAUTH-001 REMOVED)。

stages.name: 余额查询 — 5 preset (3 LLM + GitHub + Postgres)
stages.description: services/quota.rs + provider/{openai,deepseek,github,postgres}.rs::fetch_quota + commands/quota.rs。OpenAI 算法抄 openai-balance/cmd/root.go(subscription + usage 3-month iteration,cents → USD)。DeepSeek 算法抄 cc-switch/services/balance.rs::query_deepseek(/user/balance)。GitHub 查 /rate_limit API,QuotaSnapshot {total,used,remaining,unit:req}。PostgreSQL 查 pg_database_size,QuotaSnapshot {total=None, used=size_gb, unit:GB}。Anthropic 沿用 Unsupported。fetch_quota 写 quota_cache(JSON + fetched_at),15min TTL 缓存。5 个 preset 单元测试 happy path + 401 auth fail。
stages.evidence:
cargo check: PASS
OpenAI: 3-month usage iteration (hard_limit_usd cents → USD, line_items[*].cost cents → USD)
DeepSeek: /user/balance JSON → balance CNY
GitHub: /rate_limit → {limit,used,remaining,reset} req
PostgreSQL: tokio-postgres pg_database_size bytes → GB
Anthropic: Unsupported (can_fetch_quota=false)
Quota cache: 15min TTL UPSERT with ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE

webui tsc --noEmit: PASS
stages.notes: 注:tasks.md 列出 services/quota.rs,但实现将 fetch_quota 缓存逻辑放在 commands/quota.rs(更自然,靠近 IPC 层)。Anthropic 保持 QuotaError::Unsupported per REQ-QUOTA-003。

stages.name: 托盘常驻 + Detail/Tray 双 quota 同步
stages.description: tray.rs + commands/tray.rs + 托盘 UI (hover 卡 + 右键菜单)。tauri-plugin-system-tray。pinned 凭证列表 = providers WHERE pinned=1。托盘 hover 卡每行 quota 显示(沿用 quota_cache,跟 Detail 单一数据源)。右键菜单(复制 key / 打开主窗口 / 钉住 / 删除 / 退出)。点击托盘图标弹主窗口。关闭主窗口是否退出进程待用户拍板。react-query staleTime 5min 双视图同步(Detail fetch_quota 触发 → 托盘卡同步 invalidate)。

stages.name: Action Registry — Agent 可发现/可调用操作层
stages.description: 在现有 commands/ + services/ 之上新增 actions/ 层，将 12+ 个操作注册为带 schema 的可发现单元。新增 2 个 IPC：list_actions / execute_action，供外部 Agent/MCP 通过 invoke 调用。保留现有 12 个强类型 IPC 不变。
stages.notes: 设计决策：(1) 保留现有 12 IPC 不变，新增通用 IPC 专供 Agent；(2) execute_action 用 serde_json::Value 动态传参，内部严格校验；(3) 前端 mirror action-registry.ts 保持单一真相源；(4) V0.1 不做 MCP server 管理，只暴露可调用接口；(5) Agent 填参策略：description + input_schema 轻量推断，不自动填 defaults；(6) Workflow 编排留到后续阶段。

stages.name: V0.2 Search — provider 名 / 字段名 全文过滤
stages.description: webui/src/hooks/useProviders.ts::filterProviders + webui/src/components/CategorySidebar.tsx 顶部 search input。Scope: provider.name + provider.fields[].key 包含匹配(provider.fields[].value 不参与,防 secret 误暴露)。Esc 清空,搜索时全 category 强制展开,空 category 整段消失,无匹配显示「无匹配」。Client-side filter,无新 IPC,Rust 零改动。Icon.tsx 加 search icon(Search from lucide-react,plan 阶段漏核验)。
stages.evidence:
pnpm tsc --noEmit: EXIT 0
用户手动验收通过 (2026-06-25)
侧记: AddCredentialModal.tsx 类型/服务两处 placeholder option 同步加 hidden 属性(同 session 修的非搜索 bug)
stages.notes: 设计决策:(1) search 单一 owner = CategorySidebar,ProviderList 维持 dumb component;(2) field.value 不参与匹配 = 防 secret 误暴露;(3) 不引防抖 / 正则 / FTS5,includes 足够;(4) Icon.tsx 加 search 是因为现有 iconMap 不含,plan 阶段没 grep 核验。V0.3 计划: 用量历史曲线 + test_connection UI 增强。

stages.name: UI Redesign: Kaku 设计系统应用
stages.description: 把 Kaku 设计系统 (openspec/changes/ui-redesign/) 应用到 webui。Token 替换 (globals.css + tailwind.config.ts 切 Kaku 色板/字阶/间距/圆角,**含 tailwind.config.ts:4 darkMode 迁移 + ThemeToggle.tsx:17-28 data-theme 迁移 — H-3**)+ 布局重做 (删 CategorySidebar + ProviderList,改 ProviderCard + ProviderGrid + DensityToggle)+ Detail 改 Modal (**ProviderDetailModal 重用 Modal.tsx 原地改造,不再创建 ModalShell — H-1**)+ shadcn ui 组件 (button/card/input/select/toast) 全圆角 + 无 shadow。Charter 字体走 Google Fonts,加 link 标签。3 主题 (Auto/Light/Dark) 行为保留,dark 变体 coherent inversion (warm near-black #1a1916 + lightened navy #7da3d1)。Drag handle 留 affordance 不接 dnd 库。零新 IPC / 零新 schema / 零新后端 / 零 emoji。8 子任务 T-UI-001..008,@fixer 按 tasks.md 跑。T-UI-003 / T-UI-004 / T-UI-005 三者 squash 成单个 stage-12 commit 同时落地 (H-2)。
stages.notes: 用户已批准设计 (webui/dist/design-preview.html v2 + openspec/changes/ui-redesign/)。8 任务 T-UI-001..008。**关键决策**：(1) Charter 字体 Google Fonts + system fallback (Charter→Georgia→Palatino→Times New Roman);(2) Density toggle 状态 localStorage `keypilot.density` 持久化,默认 '1';(3) Modal 沿用 Radix Dialog (focus trap / Esc / overlay click 行为现成);(4) Drag handle 仅 affordance,本期不接 dnd 库,后续 V0.X 接 @dnd-kit;(5) 删 CategorySidebar + ProviderList + ProviderDetail 三个旧组件,新组件为 ProviderCard + ProviderGrid + ProviderDetailModal;(6) Auto 主题 = matchMedia resolver,无独立 data-theme='auto' 规则;(7) ProviderCard 接受 onClick + onRefresh(分离刷新与打开,避免事件冒泡)。V0.3 token-usage-history 沿用本 stage 的设计系统。**预期 build 体积 +5KB CSS / +2KB JS (估算,待 stage-12 完成后实测 — M-4)**。**Stage-12 审查补丁 (2026-06-25)**:H-1..H-5 + M-1..M-16 + L-1..L-6/L-8 已合并入 execution-plan.md / design.md / tasks.md,详见 openspec/changes/ui-redesign/execution-plan.md §3 / §6 / §7 / §10 / §11 / §13。L-7 (spec.md REQ-UI-004.4 localStorage vs DB 漂移) 不在 stage-12 scope,开独立 spec amendment PR。
